meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for Testing
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome testing gaps. An advanced guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship bulletproof apps.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves the 'no testing' dilemma by auto-generating robust test suites directly from your architectural intent. By integrating Claude Code, you transform business requirements into verifiable, self-healing test cases, ensuring your client deliverables are production-grade without requiring you to manually write a single unit test.
content.intro:
You are staring at a deadline. The code works on your machine, but the client needs guarantees—and you haven't written a single unit test. The anxiety of silent regressions is the silent killer of every freelancer's reputation. You don't have time to master Jest or Playwright from scratch; you just need the software to hold up under pressure.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This is not just boilerplate; it is an opinionated framework designed to bridge the gap between 'it runs' and 'it is reliable.' By leveraging Claude Code, we automate the generation of high-coverage test suites, turning your lack of testing expertise into a competitive advantage that clients will happily pay a premium for.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish the project structure that enforces test-first development by default.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with strict TypeScript configuration and auto-generated Vitest boilerplate.

steps.title: Generate Functional Specs
steps.description: Convert your client requirements into machine-readable specifications that serve as the foundation for your tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements document and generate a comprehensive specification file that outlines all critical user paths and edge cases.

steps.title: Automated Test Suite Synthesis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your business logic to unit tests without writing manual assertions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the generated specs, create a robust Vitest suite covering all edge cases, including error handling and boundary conditions.

steps.title: Continuous Integration Hookup
steps.description: Implement a CI pipeline that prevents any code from merging unless it passes the Antigravity test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the test suite on every push and blocks merges on failure.

steps.title: Self-Healing Refactoring
steps.description: Use AI to adjust your tests automatically when you update your business logic, keeping maintenance at near-zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current module and update all associated tests to reflect the new logic without breaking coverage.

pro_tips: Always use the --strict-mode flag in your Antigravity config to force type-safety, which reduces the number of runtime tests required.
Tag your tests with 'smoke' or 'critical' metadata so you can run a subset during rapid prototyping without waiting for full suite execution.
Inject 'negative' test cases by explicitly prompting Claude Code to simulate invalid user inputs.
Use the Antigravity 'snapshot' feature for UI components to verify visual consistency without manual pixel-perfect testing.
Keep your test files in the same directory as your source code to maintain high developer velocity during client sessions.
content.next_steps: After verifying your first test suite, push your project to a private repository and invite your client to view the 'Test Coverage' dashboard as part of your final delivery report.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting testing anxiety stall your freelance career. By mastering the Antigravity project template, you gain the confidence to ship faster and charge more for the reliability you provide. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
